sft.name: rust_enum_vs_trait_object
sft.prompt: In Rust, when would you choose an enum over a trait-object-based design? Give one concrete tradeoff and a simple rule of thumb.

sft.name: async_future_send
sft.prompt: In async Rust, what does Send mean for a Future, and when do I need it?

sft.name: rustdoc_mem_take
sft.prompt: In Rust, what does std::mem::take do? Use the docs tool.

sft.name: rustdoc_iterator_fold
sft.prompt: In Rust, what does Iterator::fold do? Use the docs tool.

sft.name: rust_debug_question_mark
sft.prompt: My Rust crate fails to compile after I changed a function to use `?` on a `Result`. I’m not sure what trait or type I need to add to make error conversion work.

sft.name: ci_timeout_fallback
sft.prompt: Our nightly integration tests started timing out in the container startup phase. What should I check first?

sft.name: file_summary_postmortem
sft.prompt: Open /docs/q3_launch_postmortem.md and summarize the main takeaways and action items.

sft.name: onboarding_rollout_plan
sft.prompt: We need a 3-week rollout plan for an in-app onboarding checklist update. Pull major tasks, confirm the team can staff it, and keep it concise.

sft.name: rust_option_vs_result
sft.prompt: In Rust, when should I return Option<T> instead of Result<T, E>? Give one concrete rule of thumb.

sft.name: rust_borrow_vs_clone
sft.prompt: In Rust, when is it better to borrow data instead of cloning it? Give one practical tradeoff.

sft.name: rustdoc_vec_retain
sft.prompt: In Rust, what does Vec::retain do? Use the docs tool.

sft.name: rustdoc_option_map
sft.prompt: In Rust, what does Option::map do? Use the docs tool.

sft.name: cargo_check_trait_bound
sft.prompt: My Rust code compiles until I add a generic helper, then cargo check complains a trait bound is missing. What should I inspect first?

sft.name: cargo_check_lifetime_hint
sft.prompt: A function that returns a reference now fails borrow checking after a refactor. What should I verify first?

sft.name: ci_failure_cached_note
sft.prompt: Our deploy job suddenly started failing during image publish. Check whether there is already a known incident note and tell me the first thing to verify.

sft.name: docs_summary_release_notes
sft.prompt: Open /docs/release_notes_draft.md and summarize the main user-facing changes and any obvious gaps.

sft.name: staffing_check_design_review
sft.prompt: We need a 2-week plan to prepare a design review and implementation kickoff for a billing settings refresh. Confirm staffing and keep it concise.

sft.prompt: We need a concise 4-week rollout plan for a search relevance update. Include implementation, validation, launch checks, and confirm team capacity.
